title: Smoky Chorizo Spanish Bowl
description: A hearty, flavorful Spanish-inspired bowl filled with spicy chorizo, smoky vegetables, and crispy potatoes.
instructions: Toss the potatoes with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, salt, and black pepper on a baking sheet. Roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy.
In a large skillet, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the sliced chorizo and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until browned.
Add the sliced red onion and minced garlic to the skillet with the chorizo. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the onion is translucent.
Sprinkle the smoky paprika over the top of the chorizo mixture and stir to combine.
To assemble the bowls, divide the roasted potatoes among four bowls. Top with the chorizo mixture, then sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Optional: Serve with a fried egg on top for added richness and flavor.
